---
title: "fuel_the_build"
author: "Danielle Samson"
date: "2026-06-11"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
data("")

ggplot(data = , aes(x = , y = , fill = exp_group)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "",
    breaks = seq(25, 60, by = 10),
    limits = c(25, 60)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "",
    breaks = seq(170, 235,by = 25),
    limits = c(170, 235)
  ) +
  geom_violin() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "WT" = "lightgrey",
    "Gt_Deer" = "black",
    "Gt_Elk" = "darkgray"
  )) +
  facet_wrap(~ exp_group) +
  labs(
    title = "Prion Burden by Brain Region",
    x = "Brain Region",
    y = "Prion Burden",
    fill = "exp_group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)   
  )
```
